evals.expected_output: A file src/sketches/ripple.ts is created with a 2d static ssam sketch structure, HMR boilerplate, wrap.render, and settings. No canvas-sketch-util imports since user didn't request them.

evals.prompt: new animated sketch called flow-field, 2d, 6 seconds, use random and math
evals.expected_output: A file src/sketches/flow-field.ts is created with animate: true, duration: 6000, framesFormat: ['mp4'], and imports for both canvas-sketch-util/random and canvas-sketch-util/math. HMR boilerplate present.

evals.prompt: make a webgl2 sketch called noise-plane, animated, 8000ms
evals.expected_output: A file src/sketches/noise-plane.ts is created using the WebGL2 template with ogl imports (Mesh, Program, Renderer, Triangle), mode: 'webgl2', animate: true, duration: 8000. No leftover placeholder comments.
